$comment: OS0 first task (saas-orun-secrets): the orun-secrets DECLARATION consumed by the orun-secrets-tests component. Secret values never become content (the orun-secrets invariant) — this file carries only the typed secret:// reference, its scope, and its consumer. The real value is written out-of-band with `orun secrets set` (OS1) and injected at run time by the orun runner; verify/local lanes use the ORUN_SECRET_<KEY> fallback. This file must never contain a value.

secrets.description: Smoke reference proving the orun-secrets write+consume path end to end.
